subject: Idempotency header name
body: What HTTP header should I send to make a lease creation request idempotent?

subject: Production rate limit
body: What is the per-minute request cap for production API keys?

subject: Duplicate webhook deliveries
body: We are seeing duplicate lease.approved webhooks for the same lease within a few minutes. Is that expected behavior?

subject: Fleet lease monthly payment
body: How do I calculate the monthly payment for a fleet lease using the API?

subject: Idempotency TTL for batch imports
body: How long are idempotency keys valid for batch lease import jobs?

subject: Schedule API crash on zero term
body: The payment schedule endpoint crashes with HTTP 500 when term_months is 0. This happens every time and blocks our QA suite.

subject: Sandbox webhooks not arriving
body: Why is my sandbox webhook URL never receiving events even though I configured it correctly?

subject: Bulk CSV import feature
body: Please add support for bulk CSV import of leases. Our ops team uploads 500 rows nightly.

subject: Wrong residual on specific lease
body: Lease LE-44291 shows residual $12,400 on the dashboard but $9,100 on the PDF export for invoice INV-99201. Which number is correct?

subject: Read-only OAuth scopes
body: What OAuth scopes are required for a read-only integration that only polls lease status?
